R

readEventItem(DocumentSnapshot) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventRepository
reads in a Event document in the database into an Event object
readMessages(DataSnapshot) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventMessageManager
reads chat messages from a realtime database snapshot
readNotificationItem(DocumentSnapshot) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.NotificationRepository
Reads a Notification document from Firestore and converts it to a NotificationItem object
readThreads(DataSnapshot) - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventMessageManager
reads message threads from a realtime database snapshot
rejectPrivateInvitationFlowTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.SendPrivateEventActivityTest
verifies that an organizer can send a private event invitation and the entrant can reject it from the inbox
rememberMeTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.LoginActivityTest
Test to see if remember me keeps the user signed in when the app is opened again
rememberMeUncheckedTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.LoginActivityTest
Test to see if leaving remember me unchecked returns the user to authentication when the app is opened again
removedOrganizerCannotEditHostedEventTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.ViewEventActivityTest
tests that a removed organizer can no longer open an old hosted event in edit mode
removeImagesTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.AdminPhotosActivityTest
Test if the admin can remove an uploaded Event poster
removeOrganizerPrivilegesTest() - Method in class com.example.eventlotterysystem.UserProfileDetailsActivityTest
Test if the admin can remove organizer privileges and suspend the organizer
